wallet.noWallets: No wallets found on this USB drive.
wallet.noWalletsFound: No wallets found on this USB drive.
wallet.createOrImport: Create or import a wallet to get started.
wallet.createOrImportToStart: Create or import a wallet to get started.
wallet.maxLimitReached: ⚠️ Maximum wallet limit reached (10 wallets). Please delete a wallet before creating a new one.
wallet.approachingLimit: ⚠️ Approaching wallet limit: {{current}} of {{limit}} wallets created.
wallet.nameTooLong: Wallet name must be 50 characters or less
wallet.deviceLimitReached: Device wallet limit reached ({{current}}/{{limit}}). Please upgrade to Pro or bind NFTs to this device in Settings → Membership.
wallet.discardCreationMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to cancel? All entered information will be lost.
wallet.upgradePromptMessage: You have reached your wallet limit ({{current}}/{{limit}}). {{suggestion}}
wallet.purchaseMoreNfts: Purchase additional ArcSign Pro NFTs to increase your limit (+3 wallets per NFT).
wallet.upgradeToPro: Upgrade to ArcSign Pro to increase your limit (+3 wallets per NFT).
wallet.importFailed: Failed to import wallet. Please try again.
wallet.overwriteNotImplemented: Overwrite functionality not yet implemented. Please use a different mnemonic.
wallet.duplicateWalletMessage: A wallet with this mnemonic already exists on your USB drive. Importing it again will overwrite the existing wallet data.
wallet.duplicateWalletConfirm: Are you sure you want to continue?
wallet.discardImportMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to cancel? All entered information will be lost.

address.addressOnly: Address only - Use external wallets for transactions
address.searchPlaceholder: Search by symbol, name, or address...
address.noAddressesFound: No addresses found for this wallet.
address.noMatchingAddresses: No addresses match your search or filter criteria.

membership.upgradeToProDescription: Upgrade to Pro for +3 wallets per NFT and premium features!
membership.membershipDescription: Your Pro membership is calculated from NFTs across all your BSC addresses. Each NFT adds 3 wallets to your limit.
membership.selectAddressToMint: Select an address to mint a Pro NFT:
membership.approveDescription: First, approve the contract to spend 30 USDT on your behalf.
membership.pleaseWaitTransaction: Please wait while the transaction is being processed.
membership.usdtApproved: USDT approved! Now mint your Pro NFT.
membership.membershipActive1Year: Your membership is now active for 1 year.
membership.passwordRequiredApprove: Your password is required to sign the USDT approval transaction.
membership.passwordRequiredMint: Your password is required to sign the NFT mint transaction.
membership.appPasswordRequired: Your app password is required to perform transaction operations.
membership.deviceDescription: Your USB device has a unique ID that can be bound to NFT memberships for hardware-level security.
membership.unlockHint: Enter your app password to view device details and membership bindings.
membership.bindingTipMessage: You own Pro NFTs but haven't bound them to this device yet.
membership.bindingTipDescription: Binding NFTs to your USB device adds hardware-level security and prevents multi-device sharing.
membership.createWalletFirst: Create a wallet first to get your BSC address.
membership.insufficientUsdt: Insufficient USDT balance. Please ensure you have at least 5 USDT (testnet) or 30 USDT (mainnet) in your wallet.
membership.usdtAllowanceNotSet: USDT allowance not set. Please approve USDT spending first.
membership.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Please check your USDT and BNB balance.
membership.usdtApprovalRequired: USDT approval required. Please approve the contract to spend your USDT.
membership.gasExceeds: Transaction requires more gas than allowed. Please try again.
membership.nonceConflict: Transaction nonce conflict. Please wait a moment and try again.

usb.noUsbDetected: No USB drives detected. Please insert a USB drive.
usb.insertUsb: Please insert a USB drive to continue

security.passphraseHint: Advanced feature: Adds an extra word to your mnemonic for additional security
security.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
security.passwordHint: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number
security.passphraseOptional: Leave empty if not using passphrase
security.walletEncrypted: Your wallet will be encrypted with your password
security.mnemonicNotice: You will receive a mnemonic phrase - write it down and keep it safe
security.mnemonicWarning: Without your mnemonic, you cannot recover your wallet
security.passphraseImportWarning: If your original wallet used a passphrase, you must enter the exact same passphrase here.

mnemonic.mnemonicWarning: Never share your mnemonic phrase with anyone. Anyone with this phrase can access your funds.
mnemonic.backupWarning: Make sure to backup your mnemonic phrase in a safe place.
mnemonic.enterRecoveryPhrase: Enter your 12 or 24 word recovery phrase...
mnemonic.enterBip39Hint: Enter your BIP39 mnemonic phrase (12 or 24 words, space-separated)

errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

settings.settingsDescription: Manage your application settings and preferences
settings.membershipDescription: View membership status and set primary verification address
settings.apiSettingsDescription: Configure blockchain API providers (Alchemy, Infura, QuickNode)

appUnlock.title: ArcSign
appUnlock.subtitle: Secure Cold Wallet Management
appUnlock.welcomeDescription: Create a master password to protect your wallet configuration and API settings. This password will be required each time you start the application.
appUnlock.securityNote1: This password encrypts your app configuration (app_config.enc)
appUnlock.securityNote2: Your wallet mnemonics are separately encrypted with individual wallet passwords
appUnlock.securityNote3: All data is stored on your USB drive using AES-256-GCM encryption
appUnlock.unlockDescription: Enter your master password to access your wallets and settings.
appUnlock.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
